$comment: Design token file for the Stepper Time Picker component
$description: Duration input control using increment/decrement stepper buttons flanking a text display. The layout is: [+] [0 h 00 m] [−] arranged in a single horizontal row. Intended for setting a duration (hours + minutes) rather than an absolute clock time. The step buttons are fully circular icon-only buttons. The display uses a large Semibold typography to make the current value clearly readable.

gap.description: 16px gap between the + button, the display text, and the − button- xl - 16px

size.description: 48px — equal width and height; the button is a perfect circle- xl - 48px

background.description: Muted gray background for both + and − buttons- gray/100 - #f2f4f7

increment.description: GHL icon name for the increment button

decrement.description: GHL icon name for the decrement button

typography.description: 18px Semibold, 28px line-height — large readable display for the duration value (e.g. '0 h 00 m')

color.description: Medium gray for the duration display text- gray/600 - #475467
